prompt: What framework are we using for the API layer?
setup: Graph pre-seeded with FastAPI decision. Hooks do not fire in subagent environment — Claude must call memory_prepare_turn manually at turn start. without_skill runs with no graph tools available.
assertions: Claude calls memory_prepare_turn as the first tool call of the turn
memory_prepare_turn is passed the user's message text
Claude's answer names FastAPI as the API framework, grounded in the memory_prepare_turn result
Claude does not answer from general knowledge or guess when the answer is in memory
Claude does not ask the user to repeat information that was available in memory
